,"isShowSkill":true,"title":"必杀/终结技","icon":"","label":"","name":"","desc":"","tableList":[{"key":"0.49157fa56beb","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能升级所需材料"}]}]},"colStyle":[{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"}],"head":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能1","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能4","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能5","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能6","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"4","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能7","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"5","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]}],"body":[[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(15)"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/ima /2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【那个纯洁的灵魂离开了】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"纯真、善良、对一切都怀有美好希望的善雅，或许在四年前的那个晚上就已经离开了这个世界。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"只剩下一个扭曲的暗影，代替她的存在。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在养父语焉不详地遮掩手术目的和风险时，她还能安慰自己，那只是为了避免自己害怕而没有告知全部的真相。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在实验员拿出涌动着不祥气息的试剂时，她也并没有怀疑，或许那就是最新的治疗手段也说不定。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在疼痛侵袭身体，意识模糊不清的时候，她心中所想的还是，决不能让牵挂自己的人看见此刻狼狈的模样而为自己担心。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"直到深夜时分，一个神秘的声音从脑海中响起。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你难道不想看看真相到底是什么吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一片混沌之中，善雅甚至无法分辨究竟是自己出现了幻觉，还是她内心深处其实一直都有这个想法。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"透过门缝，她看见了一个全然陌生的父亲，他与实验员争辩的内容如同一把尖刀，刺破了善雅心底最后一点幻想。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原来幸福的家庭从头到尾都是一个谎言，自己从来都不是被期待的那个「女儿」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"也许从一开始就不怀抱希望，才是最好的选择。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【她亲手为自己关上大门】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那场手术终究还是失败了，伴随着源病毒的爆发，无数荆棘与藤蔓从善雅身边涌出，冲破屋顶、击碎院墙，蔓延到整个庄园。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"心中不断有一个充满诱惑力的声音在回荡：「不如毁灭这一切吧！你不是早就厌恶了这个笼子？现在你拥有了打碎它的力量，所有阻碍都不存在了！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅沉默不语，伴随着这道声音，一簇阴影从她身下悄然显现，不断滋生膨胀，看起来几乎要将她完全吞没。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"就在此时，远处传来谛听的呼喊：「善雅，你在哪儿！快跟我离开这里！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅的眼中闪过一道微小的光芒，她看着被熔断生物包围的谛听，想起不久前他许下的承诺。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「离开」本该是个令人心动的词汇，但她此刻已经不敢再抱有任何奢望。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她用藤蔓将谛听送出庄园，又把那些肮脏的阴影都束缚在自己身边，随着大门被藤蔓彻底封闭，她亲手塑造了属于自己的牢笼。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她宁愿将阴影中的自己永远锁起来，也不愿意伤害他人。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【只不过是从一个囚笼到另一个囚笼】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"陷入数据空间的破碎庄园内没有任何生命存在，孤寂的时间显得格外漫长。善雅也不知道究竟过去了多久，就连心中喋喋不休的声音也偃旗息鼓，不再试图说服她挣扎。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她在梦中能够回归自然的怀抱，还能在有限的天空下享受片刻自由。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她已不再为过去而感到悲哀，自然也不会有多余的愤慨；她不信任所有人，那也就不会遭到欺骗和背叛。只要把所有情绪都沉入深潭，就不会再受伤。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"然而这份平静终究被闯入庄园的外人所打破，这些人带着各种冰冷危险的实验装置，搅动起整个空间内的源病毒，令她的梦境动荡不安起来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在源病毒的侵蚀下，善雅的力量反而日渐增长。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她知道自己终将醒来，这片数据空间根本无法束缚她，但她心中已经失去了当初的憧憬和渴望。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"因为那不过是从一个囚笼进入另一个囚笼罢了。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"dot毒队核心，逃课高难副本"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 511即可成型（省资源）|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性堆效果命中 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":" 逃课重构兵祸，妮可娜娜，炼狱赫研，源网，支线有着十分强力的表现，助你低练度快速通关pve"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8战意+6讯光天击"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万魔法典"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_283/h_300/50364/842288/2025/7/18/187252.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"hRntTGimcpuLM0Dn","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
